title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at L&T Realty

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at L&T Realty
jsonLd.description:
L&T Realty has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Realty:
L&T Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty!
